problem_text_cn: 1406 考虑一块反射光栅，槽是等间距的，间距为$d$，但有交替的反射本领$(1+\alpha)$、$(1-\alpha)$、$(1+\alpha)$、$(1-\alpha)$……，$\alpha$为比1小得多的常量。试讨论衍射强度的角分布，在什么情况下，$\alpha$的影响最显著？
problem_text_en: 1406 Consider a reflection grating with equally spaced grooves of spacing $d$, but with alternating reflectivities $(1+\alpha)$, $(1-\alpha)$, $(1+\alpha)$, $(1-\alpha)$..., where $\alpha$ is a constant much smaller than 1. Discuss the angular distribution of the diffraction intensity. Under what conditions is the effect of $\alpha$ most significant?
problem_solution_cn: 【核心思路】将总振幅分解为等幅光栅和交替调制光栅的叠加，强度分布为$I = I_0 \frac{\sin^2(N\delta/2)}{N^2\sin^2(\delta/2)}[1 + \alpha^2\tan^2(\delta/2)]$（$\delta=2\pi d\sin\theta/\lambda$）。当$\delta\approx(2p+1)\pi$（$p$为整数）时，$\tan^2(\delta/2)$最大，$\alpha$的影响最显著。
problem_solution_en: 【Core Idea】Decompose the total amplitude into the superposition of an equal-amplitude grating and an alternating modulated grating, leading to the intensity distribution $I = I_0 \frac{\sin^2(N\delta/2)}{N^2\sin^2(\delta/2)}[1 + \alpha^2\tan^2(\delta/2)]$ ($\delta=2\pi d\sin\theta/\lambda$). The effect of $\alpha$ is most significant when $\delta\approx(2p+1)\pi$ (for integer $p$), where $\tan^2(\delta/2)$ is maximized.
problem_answer: 衍射强度分布：$\boldsymbol{I = I_0 \frac{\sin^2(N\delta/2)}{N^2\sin^2(\delta/2)}[1 + \alpha^2\tan^2(\delta/2)]}$；$\alpha$影响最显著的情况：$\boldsymbol{\delta \approx (2p+1)\pi}$（$p$为整数），即$\boldsymbol{\sin\theta \approx (2p+1)\lambda/(2d)}$
